name: Curry Pizza Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Split the muffins and lay them in a single layer on a baking sheet.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients together and spread them on the muffin halves.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for about 15 minutes, until the spread is hot and bubbly.
5. Cut each half into fourths or sixths and serve.
